ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Home phone number of the customer */,
  "mobile" TEXT /* Mobile phone number of the customer */,
  "other_id" INTEGER /* Other identifier for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated customer */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "housenr" INTEGER /* House number */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Support) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "segment_id")
)
